name: Joseph
tagline: Lights out and away we go.

driver.name: Joseph Saddington
driver.series: Collegiate Racing Series · FARAUSA · SCCA · IMSA
driver.note: One of America's youngest pro racers — license at 12.

dailyTasks.title: Joseph's Daily Grid
dailyTasks.subtitle: Three things every day move the needle: build, pitch, post. Check 'em off.

tasks.title: Build the Roblox game
tasks.desc: Ship one improvement today — a new level, a mechanic, or a bug fix. Small progress every day compounds.

tasks.title: Reach out to a sponsor
tasks.desc: Send at least one new pitch or follow-up. Aim for one warm intro or one cold ask per day.

tasks.title: Upload racing content
tasks.desc: Post today's clip or photo from the track. Hit all three channels — keep the streak alive.

tasks.title: Sim / practice laps
tasks.desc: 30 focused minutes on the rig. Pick one corner or skill and drill it to qualifying pace.

tasks.title: Driver training
tasks.desc: Neck, core, cardio. Race-fit drivers finish strong in the last stint.

tasks.title: Engage with fans
tasks.desc: Reply to comments and DMs across YouTube, Instagram and TikTok. Community is the long game.

dailyTasks._notes: Joseph's recurring daily checklist. Add/edit/remove tasks here. Each task needs a unique 'id' (used to remember checkmarks). Checkboxes save in the browser and reset every morning; clearing all of them in a day extends the 🔥 streak.

_notes: Personalized for Joseph 'TOSHI #81' Saddington / Saddington Racing. Edit 'name' for the greeting, 'driver'/'team' for the hero badge, 'seriesOrder' for which championships show, 'dailyTasks' for his to-do list. Reload the page after editing.
